examples: Thousands of acres of forests and scrubland have been burnt.
The bumpy country road wound deeper into the scrubland until at last an undulating shape appeared in the distance.
Five years ago much of this farm was scrubland.
This is a rolling scrubland, and in fact, the word Puuc comes from the Maya word for hill.
Volunteers have cleared scrubland around Shepreth station so the poppies will bloom at next year's anniversary.
